name: Yangmei Chemical Co.,Ltd
summary: Yangmei Chemical Co.,Ltd. operates in the chemical industry in China. The company's products include agricultural chemicals, methanol, compound fertilizer, melamine, diaphragm caustic soda, ion-exchange membrane caustic soda, polyvinyl chloride, liquid chlorine, isobutyraldehyde, octanol, and hydrogen peroxide. It also manufactures chemical machinery; and trades in chemical products. The company was formerly known as Dongxin Electrical Carbon Co Ltd and changed its name to Yangmei Chemical Co.,Ltd. in April 2013. Yangmei Chemical Co.,Ltd. is based in Taiyuan, China.
